name: @mirai-agent/mcp
description: Mirai MCP client for CROO-licensed autonomous X campaigns.

scripts.test: pnpm build && node --test test/cli.unit.test.mjs test/config.unit.test.mjs test/hosted-client.integration.test.mjs test/hosted-client.security.test.mjs test/license.unit.test.mjs test/mcp-server.integration.test.mjs
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm build && c8 --all --include 'dist/**/*.js' --check-coverage --lines 80 --branches 80 node --test test/cli.unit.test.mjs test/config.unit.test.mjs test/hosted-client.integration.test.mjs test/hosted-client.security.test.mjs test/license.unit.test.mjs test/mcp-server.integration.test.mjs
scripts.test:unit: pnpm build && node --test test/cli.unit.test.mjs test/config.unit.test.mjs test/license.unit.test.mjs
